channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: OpenAI Researcher Miles Wang Launches AI-Driven Drug Discovery Startup Valued at $2 Billion
item.description: Miles Wang, an OpenAI researcher known for his work using artificial intelligence to accelerate scientific and biological discoveries, is preparing to leave the ChatGPT developer to found a new startu...

item.title: Iran and US clash over critical maritime routes and oil exports
item.description: The article details escalating tensions between Iran and the United States over control of vital maritime trade routes. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has threatened to block key stra...

item.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026 Addresses Technical Issues with Raid Make-Up Event
item.description: The Pokémon GO Fest 2026 event has announced a special make-up raid schedule to address technical issues that disrupted the original planned raids. Due to unforeseen technical problems, the game devel...

item.title: Ontario MPPs face criticism for charging taxpayers for Toronto hotel stays
item.description: Three Peel Region Progressive Conservative MPPs have charged Ontario taxpayers nearly $50,000 collectively for hotel stays in Toronto, despite living within 50 kilometers of Queen’s Park. The expenses...

item.title: Mbagathi Road Accident Claims Lives of Senior Officer and Two Others; Family Begins Funeral Arrangements
item.description: Allan Mwenda, a senior monitoring and evaluation officer at the National Oil Corporation of Kenya, died in a tragic road accident on Mbagathi Road. The crash claimed the lives of three people, includi...

item.title: Health clinics hit by cyberattack: 21 affected as patient data compromised
item.description: A significant cybersecurity incident has impacted 21 healthcare facilities across Australia, with personal information from patients at Partnered Health clinics being stolen. The breach, confirmed on ...

item.title: Africa's Strategic Approach to Deploying AI in Production Environments
item.description: The article explores how African businesses are transitioning from AI experimentation to commercial deployment, emphasizing the challenges of integrating generative AI into production systems. It high...

item.title: Asha Dachi's Leadership Drives Digital Transformation at TSN
item.description: Asha Dachi, the outgoing Managing Director of Tanzania Standard Newspapers (TSN), is being praised for her transformative leadership that modernized the state-owned media organization through digital ...

item.title: Estate Planning: Steps Canadians Often Delay Until It's Too Late
item.description: The article discusses the growing concern among Canadian experts about the lack of proper estate planning among citizens. Christopher Liew, a journalist and commentator, highlights how many Canadians ...

item.title: Pakistan imposes visa requirement for expired Nicop holders
item.description: The Pakistani government has clarified that overseas Pakistanis traveling on foreign passports can still enter the country with a valid National Identity Card for Overseas Pakistanis (Nicop). However,...

item.title: Gavi warns of funding risks as measles immunity gaps persist in lower-income countries
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has issued a warning as the largest-ever Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak surpasses 1,400 cases, highlighting the urgent need for global health security. However, the repo...

item.title: Teen Apologizes in Court for Fatal Stabbing of Elderly Woman in Pickering
item.description: A 15-year-old boy who fatally stabbed a retired kindergarten teacher in Pickering last year apologized in court on Tuesday. The teen, who was 14 at the time and cannot be named under the Youth Crimina...

item.title: Mike Sonko and Wife Primrose Attend Daughter's Wedding, Share Emotional Moment
item.description: Mike Sonko and his wife Primrose Mbuvi attended their adopted daughter Janet Kaingi's white wedding, sharing a heartfelt moment that highlighted their 30-year marriage. The ceremony, held at Limuru Ga...

item.title: Four Hidden White Dwarf Stars Discovered Near Earth by Astronomers
item.description: Astronomers have confirmed the existence of four previously undetected white dwarf stars in binary systems within 65 light-years of Earth. Using advanced ultraviolet observations from the Hubble Space...

item.title: Global Efforts for Nuclear Disarmament and Radiation-Free Environment
item.description: The article discusses a webinar organized by the Nuclear Information and Resource Service (NIRS) titled 'ATOMIC TIES,' which aims to promote nuclear disarmament and a radiation-free environment. The e...

item.title: Meta's new glasses raise privacy and surveillance issues
item.description: The article discusses Meta's latest product, a pair of glasses designed for facial recognition and constant data collection. These devices are undetectable, always active, and continuously transmit us...

item.title: NFIU launches women-led anti-money laundering initiative in Nigeria
item.description: The Nigerian Financial Intelligence Unit (NFIU) is set to launch a local chapter of the global Women in Anti-Money Laundering, Countering the Financing of Terrorism and Counter-Proliferation Financing...

item.title: Palantir's NHS contract faces scrutiny over effectiveness and political influence
item.description: The article investigates Palantir's £330m NHS contract, revealing concerns about the technology's efficacy and the company's political lobbying. Despite NHS England's claims of success, internal data ...

item.title: Nigerian Priest Dies After Being Ordered to Return Home Due to Visa Issues
item.description: Father Benjamin Madu, a 54-year-old Nigerian Catholic priest serving in Massachusetts, died by suicide after being directed to return to Nigeria by his diocese ahead of his visa expiration. The priest...

item.title: Gong Yoo to Hold Manila Fan Meeting on November 21
item.description: South Korean actor Gong Yoo has announced plans to host a fan meeting in Manila on November 21, 2026. The event, which will be organized by ABS-CBN, marks the first time the actor will engage directly...
